symptoms: Stripe dashboard: webhook delivery failure rate 100%, all returning HTTP 400
Order status stuck in 'payment_pending' for all orders since 14:32 UTC
Customers charged on Stripe but receiving no order confirmation
Support: 300+ tickets 'I was charged but my order disappeared'
hypotheses_tested: Stripe SDK v3 upgrade issue, specifically construct_event() requiring raw bytes
confirmed_root_cause: Stripe SDK v3.0.0 changed Webhook.construct_event() to require raw request bytes for HMAC verification, but webhook_handler.py called request.json() which re-serializes the body
resolution_action: Changed request.json() to request.get_data(as_text=False) in webhook_handler.py and replayed all failed webhook events from Stripe dashboard
